jd_text: MENA | Asia | Latin America Cebron Capital is a capital markets firm focused on originating and structuring complex cross-border transactions across emerging and developed markets. We advise corporations, developers, and institutions on accessing private credit and equity capital for growth, acquisitions, and large-scale projects. We operate across energy, technology, natural resources, infrastructure, and industrials. Position Overview The Vice President, Capital Markets Origination is responsible for sourcing, developing, and securing mandates from companies and project sponsors seeking capital solutions. This role is exclusively focused on origination — identifying and engaging qualified issuers and borrowers globally. It does not involve investor solicitation or securities placement activities. This is a performance-driven role designed for senior professionals who maintain established relationships capable of generating actionable transaction flow. Key Responsibilities Originate proprietary opportunities with corporates seeking growth or acquisition capital, project sponsors in infrastructure, energy, and industrial sectors, family-owned businesses and conglomerates, and government-linked or quasi-sovereign entities. Develop and maintain senior-level relationships with CEOs, CFOs, founders, and sponsors. Identify transactions requiring private credit financing, structured debt solutions, minority or majority equity capital, and hybrid capital structures. Evaluate opportunities at a high level — including capital requirements, transaction feasibility, and strategic alignment — and collaborate with internal teams on structuring and execution strategy. Maintain a disciplined and active pipeline of mandates. Candidate Profile 6–15+ years of experience in investment banking, private credit or direct lending, corporate finance or M&A, project finance, or principal investing and advisory. Demonstrated ability to originate transactions independently with a strong existing network in one or more of the following regions: GCC / Middle East, Africa, Southeast Asia, or Latin America. Deep understanding of capital structures, debt and equity markets, and cross-border transactions. Highly commercial, relationship-driven, and self-directed. Compensation Structure This role is structured for senior professionals seeking direct economic participation in transactions rather than fixed salary. Commission tied to mandates successfully originated and transactions that proceed to closing Profit participation in transaction-level economics generated from originated deals Alignment with long-term value creation and repeat mandates Compensation reflects origination contribution and advisory value.
